name: S&w Kick-Off Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 large Bell pepper, cut into 3/4-inch chunks
1 lb Smoked sausage, cut into 3/4-inch chunks
2 cans S&W Dark Red Kidney Beans, drained (reserve liquid)
12 oz Shredded mozzarella or cheddar cheese, for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown ground beef and ground pork sausage with onions and garlic in a large heavy pot or Dutch oven over medium heat.
2. Add bell pepper and smoked sausage chunks. Continue cooking 5-10 minutes.
3. Reduce heat to low and drain fat.
4. Blend in spices and tomatoes. Simmer 5-10 minutes.
5. Stir in kidney beans.
6. In a bowl, blend a little reserved bean liquid with corn meal to the consistency of pancake batter.
7. Mix with chili and simmer 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Spoon into serving bowls and top generously with shredded cheese. Serves 12.
Nutrition information per serving: 530 calories; 30 grams protein; 32 grams carbohydrates; 10 grams fiber; 90 milligrams cholesterol; 1650 milligrams sodium.
